name: AircallConnector
description: Connects to the Aircall (telephony) Public REST API. Reads users, numbers, calls, contacts, tags, teams, and webhooks; places outbound calls; transfers/assigns in-flight calls; CRUDs CRM contacts; manages webhook subscriptions. Uses HTTP Basic authentication (api_id + api_token).

install_fields.label: API ID
install_fields.help: Aircall Dashboard → Integrations & API → Aircall API → API ID. Sent as the Basic-auth username.

install_fields.label: API Token
install_fields.help: Aircall Dashboard → Integrations & API → Aircall API → API Token. Shown only once at creation; treat as a password. Sent as the Basic-auth password.

install_fields.label: Aircall API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the Aircall REST API. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Aircall API requests per minute. Default is 60 (Aircall's standard per-token quota).

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates api_id and api_token by calling /ping. Persists credentials on success.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Aircall API connectivity by calling /ping.

apis.name: List Calls
apis.description: Lists Aircall call events. Supports per_page, page, from/to date range (Unix epoch seconds), direction (inbound|outbound), and user_id filter.

apis.name: Get Call
apis.description: Fetches a single Aircall call by ID.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: Lists Aircall agents (users) with pagination.

apis.name: Get User
apis.description: Fetches a single Aircall user by ID.

apis.name: List Numbers
apis.description: Lists Aircall phone numbers (DIDs) assigned to the account.

apis.name: Get Number
apis.description: Fetches a single Aircall phone number by ID.

apis.name: List Contacts
apis.description: Lists Aircall CRM contacts with pagination and optional search.

apis.name: Get Contact
apis.description: Fetches a single Aircall contact by ID.

apis.name: Create Contact
apis.description: Creates a new Aircall CRM contact with name, optional company, phone numbers, and emails.

apis.name: Update Contact
apis.description: Partial-updates an existing Aircall CRM contact. At least one field is required.

apis.name: Delete Contact
apis.description: Deletes an Aircall CRM contact by ID.

apis.name: List Tags
apis.description: Lists Aircall call tags configured on the account.

apis.name: List Teams
apis.description: Lists Aircall teams (groups of users).

apis.name: List Webhooks
apis.description: Lists Aircall webhook subscriptions for the account.

apis.name: Create Webhook
apis.description: Creates a new Aircall webhook subscription on the given URL for the given event types.

apis.name: Start Outbound Call
apis.description: Initiates an outbound call from an Aircall user (agent) to a phone number, using one of the account's numbers as the caller ID.

apis.name: Transfer Call
apis.description: Transfers an in-progress call to another Aircall user.

apis.name: Assign Call
apis.description: Reassigns a call to a different Aircall user.
